title: The Country's Own Receiver Site

features.name: the-earth-s-antenna
features.desc-on-touch: It grew from the soil itself: crystalline, humming at frequencies below your hearing. The country is listening to something you can't receive.

features.name: the-silence-made-audible
features.desc-on-touch: Static so fine and coherent it almost becomes music. The land is broadcasting what it hears: itself, infinitely looped, comparing itself to nothing.

features.name: the-field-that-listens
features.desc-on-touch: Grass rows align themselves to receive. Every blade tuned to a frequency. The paddock is not idle—it is attending.

features.name: the-root-broadcast
features.desc-on-touch: Underground, the trees are transmitting. Their signals carry through soil and water. The archive receives what the country chooses to send.

features.name: the-receiver-house
features.desc-on-touch: A small shelter made from the land itself: woven grass, packed earth, a roof of stone. Inside, everything is quiet. The country speaks to itself here.

features.name: the-untuned-echo
features.desc-on-touch: A sound that arrives from no direction you can point to. The country is not speaking to you. You are only overhearing its conversation with itself.

inscription: here the land learned that listening is the only form of speech it ever needed

reverie.title: REVERIE — the receiving field at dusk, before the signal com
narr: She's sitting in the grass. You can't hear what she hears.
The field is broadcasting something—static, pattern, a vast
and patient repetition. She closes her eyes. 'The country
doesn't need us to understand', she says. 'It just needs us
to stay quiet and let it be heard.' The grass hums around you.

file.name: Frequency_That_The_Land_Chose.tmp
file.note: The archive receives what the country wishes to transmit. Not corruption—collaboration. The land has learned to encode itself. We only hold the receiver.

exits.label: back to where the archive was still learning to hear
into deeper frequencies where only stone understands
toward channels where the signal becomes weather
deeper into the understory where silence has a sound
